## Summary

Describe the issue clearly.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Open the page or section.
2. Note the viewport, browser, or device.
3. Describe what happened.

## Expected Behavior

What should happen instead?

## Screenshots or Notes

Add screenshots, links, or extra context when useful.
